arg.name: asr_topic
arg.description: Name of the ASR topic where recognized (and translated) speech will be published

arg.name: language_topic
arg.description: Name of the language topic (declared for compatibility, not published)

arg.name: azure_speech_region
arg.description: Azure Speech Service Region string (e.g. japaneast)

arg.name: enable_semantic_segmentation
arg.description: Return semantically complete segments and prevents long intermediate results

arg.name: languages
arg.description: List of locale codes for automatic language detection (e.g. ["en-US","ja-JP"])

arg.name: azure_translate_key
arg.description: Azure Translator Service Key (required for non-English language translation)

arg.name: azure_translate_region
arg.description: Azure Translator Service Region string (e.g. japaneast)

arg.name: translate_to_eng
arg.description: Whether to translate non-English recognized speech to English
